caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, speaking into a professional microphone. He wears a black t-shirt with the phrase "CHECK IT T" printed on the front, a gold chain, and a black baseball cap with a decorative emblem. He also has grey over-ear headphones resting on his head. In the background, a white wall displays yellow stars and text including "HUSTLE". To the right, a large sign reads "BOSS TALK 101". On-screen graphics appear in the lower corners: a logo on the left reads "STUDIO PODCAST" and a logo on the right reads "BOSS TALK 101" with smaller text below stating "Rt. 11 Logan Studio". Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, shifting his facial expression slightly as he speaks, with his mouth opening and closing while maintaining a focused gaze toward someone off-camera.
